description: Generalization audit eval for repos/scale_test. File-level Recall@K is the automated metric; expected_symbols are audit hints and are not used to tune retrieval.

metrics.recall: Recall@K = at least one expected file is present in top K

questions.question: Where is absl::Status defined, including its public status-code API?
questions.notes: Class definition and status-code enum live in the public status header.

questions.question: Where is absl::Status converted to a debug string for non-ok status values?
questions.notes: Implementation is in status.cc; inline public wrapper is in status.h.

questions.question: Where is the ABSL_ATTRIBUTE_NORETURN macro defined for compiler-specific no-return annotations?
questions.notes: Compiler branch macro definitions are in absl/base/attributes.h.

questions.question: Where does Abseil parse command line flags and define ParseCommandLine?
questions.notes: Public declaration is in parse.h; parsing implementation is in parse.cc.

questions.question: Where are Abseil ABSL_CHECK assertions defined?
questions.notes: The public ABSL_CHECK macro family is declared in absl_check.h.

questions.question: Where is raylib Camera3D defined?
questions.notes: Camera3D is a public typedef struct in raylib.h.

questions.question: Where is raylib InitWindow implemented?
questions.notes: Window creation and OpenGL context initialization start in rcore.c.

questions.question: Where are raylib version constants and RAYLIB_VERSION defined?
questions.notes: Version macros are in the public raylib.h header.

questions.question: Where does raylib store configuration flags before window initialization?
questions.notes: SetConfigFlags is implemented in rcore.c; flag values are declared in raylib.h.

questions.question: Where is raylib TraceLog implemented for warning and error messages?
questions.notes: TraceLog is declared in raylib.h and implemented in rcore.c.

questions.question: Where is ImGuiIO defined for application configuration and IO state?
questions.notes: ImGuiIO public struct lives in imgui.h.

questions.question: Where is ImGui::Begin implemented?
questions.notes: The main window begin implementation is in imgui.cpp.

questions.question: Where are IMGUI_VERSION and IMGUI_VERSION_NUM defined?
questions.notes: Version macros are at the top of imgui.h.

questions.question: Where does Dear ImGui create a context with ImGui::CreateContext?
questions.notes: Public declaration is in imgui.h; context allocation is implemented in imgui.cpp.

questions.question: Where are Dear ImGui user-error assertions defined?
questions.notes: Recoverable user-error macros live in imgui_internal.h; base IM_ASSERT is in imgui.h.

questions.question: Where is the testing::Test fixture base class defined?
questions.notes: The public fixture base class is defined in gtest.h.

questions.question: Where is testing::UnitTest::Run implemented?
questions.notes: The main test runner implementation is in gtest.cc.

questions.question: Where is the EXPECT_EQ assertion macro defined?
questions.notes: EXPECT_EQ is part of the public assertion macro set in gtest.h.

questions.question: Where does GoogleTest initialize itself with InitGoogleTest?
questions.notes: Public overloads are declared in gtest.h and implemented through InitGoogleTestImpl in gtest.cc.

questions.question: Where is the internal GTEST_CHECK_ fatal check macro defined?
questions.notes: GTEST_CHECK_ is an internal all-mode assertion macro in gtest-port.h.
